assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Gravity-aware braking BRAKE_SAFETY factor is >= 1.15
assertionResults.title: BRAKE_SAFETY factor is >= 1.15

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Orbital insertion _circularOrbitSpeed returns correct orbital velocity
assertionResults.title: _circularOrbitSpeed returns correct orbital velocity

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Orbital insertion returns 0 for tiny bodies with negligible mass
assertionResults.title: returns 0 for tiny bodies with negligible mass

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Orbital insertion arrival distance scales with body radius
assertionResults.title: arrival distance scales with body radius

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Collision avoidance returns null when no bodies are in the way
assertionResults.title: returns null when no bodies are in the way

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Collision avoidance steers away when the sun is directly in the flight path
assertionResults.title: steers away when the sun is directly in the flight path

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Collision avoidance steers away when the sun is slightly off the flight path
assertionResults.title: steers away when the sun is slightly off the flight path

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Collision avoidance does not avoid the target body itself
assertionResults.title: does not avoid the target body itself

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager Collision avoidance ignores low-mass bodies
assertionResults.title: ignores low-mass bodies

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager engage / disengage engage sets state to ALIGN and stores target
assertionResults.title: engage sets state to ALIGN and stores target

assertionResults.fullName: AutopilotManager engage / disengage disengage resets all state
assertionResults.title: disengage resets all state

assertionResults.title: setEfficiency clamps to [0, 1] and defaults to 0

assertionResults.title: COAST state is defined in AP_STATE

assertionResults.title: ACCEL transitions to COAST when closing rate exceeds target coast speed
